reference_answer: Lio Vale joined the repair circle at the start of October.
Nessa Cho left the repair circle after the September inventory closed.
Lio Vale replaced Nessa Cho as rotation steward for Kit Room R.
Nessa Cho no longer held the rotation steward role.
Tablet T-8 is owned by the tool library.
Lio Vale has custody of tablet T-8 during the October repair-circle shifts.
Lio must return tablet T-8 to the desk drawer after each shift.
Amir Sol is responsible for the key box.
